content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_JOB_SERVICE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_JOB_SERVICE]
( 
	[JobServiceID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[JobID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[CustomerID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[ServiceStatusID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[ServiceCategoryID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[InstallerID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[AssignedToID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[EnteredOnDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[PartOrderedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[EstimatedArrivalDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ReceivedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ScheduledServiceDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[CompletionDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[Description] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL,
	[PONumber] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[IsBillable] [bit]  NULL,
	[AmountCharged] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[PaidInFull] [bit]  NULL,
	[Parts] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[Resolution] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[EnteredBy] [int]  NULL,
	[LastEditedBy] [int]  NULL,
	[Notes] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[LP_JobServiceID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_JobID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CustomerID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_ServiceStatusID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_ServiceCategoryID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_InstallerID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_AssignedToID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [JobServiceID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
